name: pi-esr
description: Engineering State Runtime — structured task tracking, state management, and DAG execution for coding agents. Turn every coding session into a queryable, auditable knowledge graph.

interface.shortDescription: Structured entity tracking, state management, and DAG execution for coding agents
interface.longDescription: ESR transforms every coding session into a queryable knowledge graph. Create entities (Actor, Artifact, Task, Concept, Constraint), track tasks through draft→active→stable lifecycle, link typed relations (depends_on, produces, evaluates, etc.), execute DAGs via esr_create_node + esr_run, and recall past context with memory tools. Think of it as Git for your agent's decision-making — every decision becomes an entity, every action becomes a relation, every outcome becomes a score.
defaultPrompt: Structure your work with ESR: call esr_get_context first, create entities for tasks/modules/decisions, track progress through state transitions, and follow the closure protocol when completing work
